name: InlineQueryResultMpeg4Gif
description: Represents a link to a video animation (H.264/MPEG-4 AVC video without sound). By default, this animated MPEG-4 file will be sent by the user with optional caption. Alternatively, you can use input_message_content to send a message with the specified content instead of the animation.

fields.name: type
fields.description: Type of the result, must be mpeg4_gif

fields.name: id
fields.description: Unique identifier for this result, 1-64 bytes

fields.name: mpeg4_url
fields.description: A valid URL for the MPEG4 file

fields.name: thumbnail_url
fields.description: URL of the static (JPEG or GIF) or animated (MPEG4) thumbnail for the result

fields.name: thumbnail_mime_type
fields.description: MIME type of the thumbnail, must be one of “image/jpeg”, “image/gif”, or “video/mp4”. Defaults to “image/jpeg”.

fields.name: caption
fields.description: Caption of the MPEG-4 file to be sent, 0-1024 characters after entities parsing

fields.name: parse_mode
fields.description: Mode for parsing entities in the caption. See formatting options for more details.

fields.name: caption_entities
fields.description: List of special entities that appear in the caption, which can be specified instead of parse_mode

fields.name: show_caption_above_media
fields.description: Pass True, if the caption must be shown above the message media

fields.name: reply_markup
fields.description: Inline keyboard attached to the message

fields.name: input_message_content
fields.description: Content of the message to be sent instead of the video animation
